item.dc:creator: unJalapeno

item.title: Welp, that happened
item.description:
He came from the side of me so I didn’t even see it coming but he was millimeters from my face. Since I didn’t see him coming, I didn’t even flinch which pissed him off more. He was yelling something in German that sounded vaguely like “you aren’t welcome in my country” but my German is shit so who knows. I am not gay but I am a supporter and love rainbow colored clothing. The people around me were appalled and stared him down while his friend pulled him back, dude probably saved my nose.
No one better come after rainbow Luciefur or shit will get real.
item.dc:creator: biggaymeow

item.dc:creator: JasonRedfield

item.title: RIP: Lynn Conway
item.description: I won’t copy the whole Wikipedia entry - but she was instrumental in the design and evolution of the computer processors we use today - and was fired from IBM for being herself. IBM eventually apologized. Lynn Ann Conway (January 2, 1938 - June 9, 2024) was an American computer scientist, electrical engineer and transgender activist. https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lynn_Conway
item.dc:creator: sleestacks

item.title: All black Oni Mask
item.description:
Finished up this 3D printed Oni Mask. I want to paint it but not sure what color pattern to choose. File design by Pipe Cox.
Printed on an FLSUN v400 . Here's a short video mid print.
A photo of the finished product.

item.title: For your next interview with the manager
item.dc:creator: Felimelinesk

item.title: Images of Note: Fueled by Autism
item.description:
BEHOLD, A BLORBO
This seems to be the year of large companies getting fucked over by their own greed.
Every time I hear someone who knows shit about digital security bring up the subject my paranoia grows and I consider daily driving Tails.
People are horrified by this but kids are influenced by memes from the media they watch. Think of all the cringe shit you said on the playground.
This is true
yippie!
Consider: Bone Conducting headphones
A Twink and a redhead is just Team Rocket?
http://discord.abbii.gay http://twitch.abbii.gay http://tumblr.abbii.gay http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: What do we say to the god of death?

item.title: Absolutely mesmerising
item.description: Automata sculpture by artist Tim Lewis titled "Sargasso Sea Floor". The fish is made from plastic milk bottles, the same you see scattered below on the ground.
item.dc:creator: BrainTaffy

item.title: Your wholesome Wednesday dump, to get you trough the rest of the week. (You look like you need some uplifting,I got you)
item.description:
1. The proper way to work out
2. My kinda gal
3. Husband gets some help
4. The best kind of prank
5. Vicious predator barely kept from victims
6. HE GOT THE MOVES
7. SHE GOT THE MOVES
8 SHE GOT THE MOVES 2
9. Best alarm...
10. Japan s forgotten indigenous people
11. Your moment of chill
12. Bear learns a second language
13. ONE MILLION CARROTS
14. Awww
15. Thank you for upvoting this dump, if you did you are probably as hot as the hottest woman of 1995 - Tea Leoni! P.S. If this dump helped uplift your mood, please consider checking out my passion project - I'm working on a wacky game, inspired by The Stanley Parable, with lots of humor and wholesome moments. Please wishlist on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Thank you for your kindness!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
